profile.name: Shreyansh Tiwari
profile.tagline: Building interactive apps with beautiful UI and smooth animations.

topics.response: I'm Shreyansh's portfolio assistant 🤖 — I can tell you all about him: his skills, projects, experience, education and how to get in touch. What would you like to know?

Hi, I'm Shreyansh Tiwari — a Computer Science Engineering student passionate about Cloud Computing, Cybersecurity, and Full Stack Development. I love building interactive applications with beautiful UI and smooth animations, and I'm currently available for internship opportunities.

Here's my skill set:

• Frontend: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, React
• Backend: Java, Spring Boot
• Cloud: Google Cloud Platform
• Cybersecurity: Linux, Networking
• Programming: C++, Python

I work with React, JavaScript, HTML/CSS on the frontend, Java and Spring Boot on the backend, Google Cloud Platform for cloud deployments, and C++ / Python for programming and problem-solving. I'm also comfortable with Linux and networking fundamentals.

Here are some projects I've built:

• Disk Scheduling Simulator — visualizes FCFS, SCAN, SSTF and C-SCAN algorithms (Java, Algorithms)
• Deadlock Detection Simulator — models resource allocation graphs to detect OS deadlocks (Java, Graph Theory)
• Employee Verification System — a full-stack app with role-based access control (Spring Boot, React, Cloud)

Scroll down to the "Featured Work" section to see them in detail!

My experience so far includes:

• Google Cloud Arcade Facilitator — guided peers through Cloud Arcade quests and skill badge labs
• GDG On Campus Volunteer — helped coordinate developer sessions and workshops
• Cloud Jam Organizer — co-organized hands-on cloud lab events
• Hackathon Participant — built and presented projects under time constraints
I'm currently pursuing a B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering. My coursework covers Data Structures & Algorithms, Operating Systems, Computer Networks, and Cloud Computing.
You can reach out via Gmail (shreyanshtiwari.cs@gmail.com) or connect with me on LinkedIn / GitHub. You'll find my direct contact details and social links in the "Let's Connect" section of this site.
You can find my certifications in the Certificates section of this site, and reach out via the Contact section for a copy of my full resume.
Hey there! 👋 I'm Shreyansh's AI assistant. Ask me about his skills, projects, experience, education, or how to get in touch.
You're welcome! Let me know if you'd like to know anything else about Shreyansh 🙂
